sglang.title: perf: trtllm_mla attention backend spec decoding speedup w/ cuda graph
sglang.author: cicirori
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The trtllm_mla backend was selecting kernels during CUDA graph capture using very small sequence lengths.
This often led to inefficient kernel choices in most runtime cases, degrading overall performance.
Modifications
Now the kernel selection uses max_context_len instead of the real inpu

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[cpu][fix] Fix onednn_mm crash on consecutive matmuls with same M,K,N and different dtype
Makes weight dtype part of the cache key for ClassMatmulCacheKey to avoid having 2 onednn_mm(s) with same src/weight dimensions and different dtypes mapped to the same dnnl::matmul primitive
Fixes: #27465

vllm.title: [Perf][Async Scheduling] Remove CPU->GPU sync in dummy_run
vllm.author: lhtin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In DP case,  by default, copying a tensor from CPU to GPU uses a synchronous copy in dummy run. Switching to an asynchronous copy reduces synchronization operations, which can reduce the impact on async scheduling performance.
